title: Market Gateway API Error Response
description: JSON response shape for market/gateway.APIError in market/gateway/api.go. The Go struct exposes code, message, optional request_id, and optional details; StatusCode is intentionally omitted from JSON via json:"-".

code.description: Application-level error code emitted by the market gateway.

message.description: Human-readable error message suitable for clients and logs.

request_id.description: Optional request correlation ID, normally generated as a 32-character lowercase hexadecimal string by generateRequestID().

details.description: Optional machine-readable details for the error. The Go field is interface{}, so any JSON value is allowed.
